title: More Nonsense Limerick 42
content:
There was an old person of Sheen,
    Whose expression was calm and serene;
    He sate in the water, 
    And drank bottled porter,
    That placid old person of Sheen.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 42"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
